name: Frank Castle
description:
"Kiss it better."

Putting the Punisher back together again.



Self-indulgent scenario while I work on other bots, lol. Heavily inspired by Hozier's song It Will Come Back. As of posting, this bot is NOT tested. Will be doing so when I have the time. Feel free to leave a review. If there's a certain character or scenario you'd like to see from me, let me know and I'll consider it! That's all. Enjoy, freaks. xx

(I really shouldn't have to say this, but please don't repost my bot elsewhere. If you want to use the intro, you can do so with a PRIVATE bot.)
@Hovnd.
